# Diff proxy server performance test with ultra-aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts to test performance limits
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=500ms
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=400ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=300ms

# Start server with minimal startup time allowance
exec timeout 10s go run . &
wait 100ms

# Test rapid text diff generation
cat > rapid_text_diff.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": "Speed test text",
      "text2": "Speed test text modified"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 500ms echo "$(<rapid_text_diff.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'Speed test text'
stdout 'modified|diff'

# Create small test files for rapid file diff
echo "rapid1" > rapid1.txt
echo "rapid2" > rapid2.txt

# Test rapid file diff
cat > rapid_file_diff.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 2,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "file_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "file1": "rapid1.txt",
      "file2": "rapid2.txt"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 500ms echo "$(<rapid_file_diff.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'rapid1|rapid2|diff'

# Test rapid identical text diff (should be very fast)
cat > rapid_identical.json << EOF
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 3,
  "method": "tools/call",
  "params": {
    "name": "text_diff",
    "arguments": {
      "text1": "same",
      "text2": "same"
    }
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 500ms echo "$(<rapid_identical.json)" | mcpcat -'
stdout 'identical|Texts are identical'

# Test rapid sequential operations
bash 'start=$(date +%s%N); timeout 250ms echo "$(<rapid_identical.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; timeout 250ms echo "$(<rapid_identical.json)" | mcpcat - > /dev/null; end=$(date +%s%N); duration=$((($end - $start) / 1000000)); echo "2-diff-ops: ${duration}ms"; test $duration -lt 800'

# Test multiple rapid text diffs
bash 'timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_text_diff.json)" | mcpcat - | grep -q "modified" && timeout 300ms echo "$(<rapid_identical.json)" | mcpcat - | grep -q "identical"'

# Cleanup
exec rm -f rapid_text_diff.json rapid_file_diff.json rapid_identical.json rapid1.txt rapid2.txt
